PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Feb-23-2016 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-24-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Scherer for (petitioner) James Jewell.

The Court stated that this is a probate of a lost will, that there is evidence that there is no reason to conclude that Mr. Lauer did not make the will, that there have been no objections, that the evidence supports this result and that the court is inclined to grant the petition and admit the lost will to probate. The Court granted the petition for probate of lost will and for letters testamentary (subject to review of the order). The status date for closing the estate is June 21, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
